compiled_state.title: Implement WORKTREE_TRACKING:start — create contract spec and add write instructions to sprint, fix-bug, task-execution
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Context
Story 06da-ab37 (Walking Skeleton A): Add WORKTREE_TRACKING:start comment writes so sub-agents and orchestrators record their active branch on each ticket before implementation begins. This task implements the changes that make the RED tests from Task 1 pass.

## Files to Create/Modify
- CREATE: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/worktree-tracking-comment.md
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (Phase 1, after ticket transition to in_progress)
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md (Step 0.5, after ticket set to in_progress)
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md (before CHECKPOINT 1/6)

## Implementation Steps

### 1. Create contract spec: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/worktree-tracking-comment.md
Define the WORKTREE_TRACKING comment format with three event types:
- ## :start — fields: branch (current git branch), session_branch (orchestrator's branch), timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC)
  Example: WORKTREE_TRACKING:start branch=worktree-20260418-123456 session_branch=worktree-20260418-100000 timestamp=2026-04-18T12:34:56Z
- ## :complete — fields: branch, outcome (merged|discarded), timestamp
  Example: WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete branch=worktree-20260418-123456 outcome=merged timestamp=2026-04-18T13:00:00Z
- ## :landed — fields: branch, ticket_id, timestamp
  Example: WORKTREE_TRACKING:landed branch=main ticket_id=abc1-2345 timestamp=2026-04-18T14:00:00Z
- Serialization: space-separated key=value pairs after the event type prefix
- Fail-silent policy: writes must not block work if .tickets-tracker/ is unavailable

### 2. Modify sprint SKILL.md — Phase 1 injection
Find: "Mark ticket in-progress: `.claude/scripts/dso ticket transition <primary_ticket_id> in_progress`"
After the in_progress transition line AND before "Mark the **Select and validate primary ticket** todo item", insert:

```
Post WORKTREE_TRACKING:start on the epic/bug ticket (fail silently if .tickets-tracker/ unavailable):
```bash
_BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
_TS=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
.claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <primary_ticket_id> "WORKTREE_TRACKING:start branch=${_BRANCH} session_branch=${_BRANCH} timestamp=${_TS}" 2>/dev/null || true
```
```

### 3. Modify fix-bug SKILL.md — Step 0.5 injection
Find the Step 0.5 section where the bug ticket is transitioned to in_progress.
After the in_progress transition in Step 0.5 AND before Step 1 begins, insert the same WORKTREE_TRACKING:start write pattern (same bash block as above, using BUG_TICKET_ID instead of primary_ticket_id).

### 4. Modify task-execution.md — before CHECKPOINT 1/6
Find step 1: "Run `.claude/scripts/dso ticket show {id}` to read your full task description..."
The step ends with: `→ Write checkpoint: `.claude/scripts/dso ticket comment {id} "CHECKPOINT 1/6: Task context loaded ✓"``
Before the CHECKPOINT 1/6 line (but after the ticket show command), insert:
```
→ Write WORKTREE_TRACKING:start (fail silently if .tickets-tracker/ unavailable):
  ```bash
  _BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
  _SESSION_BRANCH=$(git -C "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
  _TS=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
  .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment {id} "WORKTREE_TRACKING:start branch=${_BRANCH} session_branch=${_SESSION_BRANCH} timestamp=${_TS}" 2>/dev/null || true
  ```
```

### 5. Verify
Run bash tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh — all 6 tests must pass GREEN.
Run bash tests/run-all.sh to confirm no regressions.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/docs/contracts/worktree-tracking-comment.md exists with ## :start, ## :complete, ## :landed sections
  Verify: grep -q "## :start" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/worktree-tracking-comment.md && grep -q "## :complete" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/worktree-tracking-comment.md && grep -q "## :landed" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/worktree-tracking-comment.md
- [ ] sprint SKILL.md contains WORKTREE_TRACKING:start instruction after ticket transition to in_progress in Phase 1
  Verify: grep -q "WORKTREE_TRACKING:start" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] fix-bug SKILL.md contains WORKTREE_TRACKING:start instruction in Step 0.5 section
  Verify: grep -q "WORKTREE_TRACKING:start" plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] task-execution.md contains WORKTREE_TRACKING:start write before "CHECKPOINT 1/6"
  Verify: python3 -c "import sys; lines=open('plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md').readlines(); wt=[i for i,l in enumerate(lines) if 'WORKTREE_TRACKING:start' in l]; cp1=[i for i,l in enumerate(lines) if 'CHECKPOINT 1/6' in l]; sys.exit(0 if wt and cp1 and min(wt)<min(cp1) else 1)"
- [ ] All 6 RED tests from Task 1 now pass GREEN
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (pre-existing failures excluded)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
